title: Notifications - Device charging
scenario: Charging notification displays headset name and "Charging" text when headset is plugged in while Poly Lens app is in background, and tapping notification redirects to Home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and pair/connect a supported Bluetooth headset.
2. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
3. Plug the headset into a power source (e.g., USB charger).
4. Observe the notification area (status bar) for a charging notification.
5. Verify the notification displays the headset name and the text "Charging".
expected: A charging notification appears showing the headset name and "Charging" text. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens app's Home screen for the device.
